use_cases: Hero section background animation for landing pages
Decorative animated background for websites and apps
Loading screen or splash page visual effect
ai_summary: A WebGL shader animation component built with Three.js that renders a time-based geometric pattern featuring oscillating concentric lines with RGB color channel separation. The shader uses GLSL fragment and vertex shaders to create a dynamic, generative visual effect that continuously morphs over time. Best suited as a decorative hero background, loading animation, or atmospheric visual accent for creative, SaaS, and media applications.
